content: No rush — take your time on the title. We can update it in the final version.
Will share links to last year's welcome video and trailer reel in a separate reference sheet — shouldn't live in the contract itself.
Agreed — this is Ana's call once the schedule is locked. Leaving the number flexible in the updated version for now. Erin's reply to Ana here is the right move.
Bumped this to 8-10 hrs in the updated version to reflect Erin's actual squad call cadence.
Removing sponsor logo compilation from Erin's scope — that's intern-appropriate work. Updated version reflects this.

Agreed with Erin — removing slide deck assembly from scope entirely. The updated version moves it to 'Not Included' with an advisory note: Erin may review decks for visual alignment and brand consistency, but production and assembly lives elsewhere. This frees hours for the storytelling work that came out of the squad call conversation.
